productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girls Woven Pink Pedal Pusher
description: Style Note Girls will love these pedal pusher from Gini and Jony. Team them with a T-shirt and sandals, and she can play in comfort. Product Details Pink pedal pusher, has two side pockets, two back pockets, waistband with an elasticated back, belt loops, button and zipper closure on the front and button detailing above the hems Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cool with like colours using a mild detergent Do not tumble dry, bleach or soak Wash and dry inside out in shade Warm iron; Do not iron on print/embroidery
